problem id: 314d28a0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHL(3)

examples:
  11010100 -> 10010101
  11001100 -> 01010011
  10001011 -> 10111010
  11011110 -> 01000111
  00000111 -> 11111001
  00010101 -> 11101101
  11010000 -> 10110100
  01110000 -> 10011100

query: 10100000
predicted answer: 00101000
